phases.label: Gather Preferences
phases.description: Collect travel requirements from the user (destination, dates, budget, group info, interests, etc.)

phases.label: Shortlist Destinations
phases.description: Research and shortlist 8-10 destinations matching the user's preferences

phases.label: Select Destinations
phases.description: Present the shortlisted destinations and let the user choose which ones to explore

phases.label: Research Experiences
phases.description: Find activities and experiences at the selected destinations that match preferences

phases.label: Plan Itinerary
phases.description: Build a day-by-day itinerary slotting places and activities

phases.label: Research Accommodation & Flights
phases.description: Research places to stay and flight options for the trip

phases.label: Final Plan
phases.description: Present the complete, detailed travel plan with all details

destinations.name: Athens
destinations.description: The heart of Ancient Greece. Perfect for mythology (Acropolis, Temple of Olympian Zeus) and history. Kid-friendly parks and museums like the Hellenic Children's Museum.

destinations.name: Naxos
destinations.description: Known for being the most family-friendly Cycladic island. Shallow sandy beaches (St. George Beach) and the iconic Portara gate from the Temple of Apollo.

destinations.name: Crete
destinations.description: The largest island, home to the Palace of Knossos (Minotaur's Labyrinth). Features stunning family-friendly beaches like Elafonisi (pink sand).

destinations.name: Nafplio
destinations.description: A beautiful coastal town in the Peloponnese. A great base to visit the ancient theater of Epidaurus and the ruins of Mycenae. High mythology value.
Famous for its medieval town and the Acropolis of Lindos. Great beaches and the unique Valley of the Butterflies which is a hit with kids.
destinations.name: Rhodes
Corfu
destinations.description: A lush, green island with Venetian influence. Features the Achilleion Palace (dedicated to Achilles) and calm, turquoise waters.

destinations.name: Delphi
destinations.description: The center of the world in ancient times. A bit of a drive from Athens, but essential for mythology enthusiasts. Best as a day trip or overnight.
A relaxed, quintessential Greek island experience. Pounta and Golden Beach are great for families, with a slower pace than Mykonos or Santorini.
destinations.name: Paros
Aegina
destinations.description: Just an hour ferry from Athens. Great for a quick island fix. Features the Temple of Aphaia which forms a 'Holy Triangle' with the Parthenon and Sounion.
